title: Watch: Kuwait's ministries complex building targeted in 'hostile' drone attack
content: Kuwait's ministries complex and Shuwaikh oil sector were hit by a hostile drone attack on Sunday, which the finance ministry attributed to "unjust Iranian aggression." While significant material damage was reported, authorities confirmed no casualties. Kuwaiti air defenses intercepted incoming threats as part of Iran's ongoing offensive across the Gulf.

title: Watch: Trump claims ‘many of Iran’s military leaders’ killed in ‘massive’ strike; shares video
content: US President Donald Trump claims "many of Iran's military leaders" were "terminated" in a major Tehran strike, sharing explosion footage without specifics. This follows Iran's missile attacks on Gulf states, Iraq, and Israel, and the downing of a US F-15 jet. Both nations have exchanged threats and carried out attacks, raising concerns of war crimes.

title: Sooryavanshi tipped for major role in BCCI’s make-or-break red-ball mission
content: India's cricket board is rebuilding its Test team. A new plan focuses on young players for the future. A four-day competition will feature 64 players under 25. This aims to create a strong pipeline of red-ball cricketers. Coaches and selectors will prioritize Test development. Emerging and India A teams will tour Sri Lanka for four-day games.

title: Handbrake not properly engaged? Elderly woman crushed to death by Thar in UP
content: A tragic accident in Farrukhabad, Uttar Pradesh, claimed the life of a 75-year-old woman. While closing a gate for an SUV, she was crushed against a wall when the vehicle unexpectedly rolled backward. CCTV footage captured the harrowing moments. Authorities suspect the handbrake may not have been fully engaged, leading to the fatal incident.

title: Amid job cuts, Canadian billionaire Kevin O’Leary points out a good thing about AI layoffs
content: Kevin O'Leary, the Canadian billionaire, asserts that artificial intelligence is elevating human creativity, making artists and storytellers more valuable than ever. He highlights how compelling social media content, especially short-form videos, now commands significant salaries due to measurable customer acquisition. O'Leary believes AI is a powerful productivity tool, fostering new industries and opportunities across all economic sectors.

title: Rohit Sharma scripts IPL history, surpasses MS Dhoni to...
content: Rohit Sharma scored 35 but made history by hitting his 51st six against Delhi Capitals, the most by an Indian against one IPL team, surpassing MS Dhoni. The milestone highlights his dominance despite a modest knock. He also neared 6000 runs for Mumbai Indians, while Chris Gayle still holds the overall record globally.

title: Security breach at NIT Silchar as male student enters girls’ hostel naked
content: In a bewildering turn of events at NIT Silchar, an MBA student was found wandering into the girls' hostel in a state of undress, sparking immediate alarm among residents. Witnesses suggest that the individual may have been under the influence of substances or grappling with mental health issues, managing to evade security protocols.

title: Reason the 6am email from 'Oracle leadership' told thousands of laid-off employees
content: Oracle has begun its largest-ever round of layoffs, with employees receiving termination emails from "Oracle Leadership" at 6AM saying their roles had been eliminated after "careful consideration of Oracle's current business needs." Around 10,000 employees have reportedly been cut so far, with estimates suggesting the total could reach 30,000. The email gave employees a narrow window to act before systems were deactivated.

title: 1 dead, 3 rescued as 10-year-old lodge collapses in Madhya Pradesh’s Anuppur
content: A four-storey building collapsed near the bus stand in Kotma, Anuppur, Madhya Pradesh, killing one person and injuring three others who were rescued. The nearly 10-year-old lodge crumbled around 5:30 pm, trapping guests, staff, and labourers. Excavation work in an adjacent house is suspected to have weakened the structure, prompting an inquiry by the district administration.

title: OpenClaw creator, who Sam Altman hired for millions, reacts to Anthropic banning his AI Agent
content: Anthropic has stopped supporting OpenClaw for its Claude subscriptions. This decision follows a recent leak of Anthropic's Claude Code source code. Anthropic cites increased demand and usage patterns of third-party tools as reasons for the change. Subscribers will receive credits and can purchase discounted usage bundles. OpenClaw's creator expressed disappointment but acknowledged efforts to mitigate the impact.

title: 'Right of our mothers, sisters': PM Modi asks women to 'pressure' opposition on quota bill
content: Prime Minister Modi announced the women's reservation law will be implemented from the 2029 Lok Sabha polls, urging women to pressure the opposition for unopposed passage. He refuted claims that southern states would lose seats due to population control, stating the government will increase Lok Sabha constituencies to accommodate the 33% quota for women.

title: ‘Dhurandhar: The Revenge’ eyes Rs 1,600 crore worldwide
content: Ranveer Singh's 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge' continues its impressive box office run, nearing the Rs 1000 crore mark domestically. The spy thriller has grossed over Rs 1550 crore worldwide, with strong weekend performances bolstering its overall collection. The film is currently enjoying its third weekend in theaters.

title: Tiger Woods faces legal heat as crash victim hires lawyer after DUI
content: Tiger Woods faces more pressure after Jeromy Bullard hired lawyer Jason Fagnano following their Florida crash. While no injuries occurred, legal action may grow. Woods already faces DUI-related charges. His past accidents, possible rehab trip to Switzerland, and support from Vanessa Trump have all added new layers to an already serious situation, as reported by TMZ and Daily Mail.

title: Giannis vs Bucks turns messy as NBA probes injury controversy
content: A major NBA dispute is unfolding involving the Milwaukee Bucks and star player Giannis Antetokounmpo. Antetokounmpo claims he is healthy, but the team states he is injured. This situation has sparked an NBA investigation into potential "tanking" by the Bucks to improve draft picks. Fans are siding with Antetokounmpo, raising concerns about his future with the team.

title: Stephen Curry, Ayesha Curry join $150b mogul in heartwarming move
content: Stephen Curry and Ayesha Curry have joined Warren Buffett in reviving his iconic charity lunch through a new auction titled “A Seat At The Table.” The initiative blends Buffett’s legacy in philanthropy with the Currys’ growing influence beyond basketball. With proceeds benefiting the Glide Foundation and Eat. Learn. Play. Foundation, the event aims to create meaningful change in underserved communities. Scheduled for June 24 in Omaha, the auction reflects a powerful collaboration focused on impact, purpose, and long-term community support.

title: Courier parcels from France, Belgium fuelled drug racket across Indian cities
content: Telangana investigators have busted a Nigeria-linked drug syndicate using European courier routes, primarily France and the Netherlands, to smuggle cocaine into India. A key operative, Nigerian national Iwuala Udoka Stanley, was arrested, revealing a pan-India distribution network supplying drugs to major cities and smaller towns. The probe uncovered a choreographer who received large cocaine consignments from Europe.

title: 'Credit to Dhruv Jurel': Inside RR's Jofra Archer move that turned the game vs GT
content: Parag said he had a different plan initially but changed it after Jurel’s input. "I was actually going to switch the order but credit to Jurel - he asked me to go with Jofra for the 19th. Wanted to go as fast as possible and as straight as possible," Parag said after the match.

title: Himanta vows free LPG cylinders for puja, Bihu; code violation, says Congress
content: Assam CM Himanta Biswa Sarma announced free LPG cylinders for Bihu and Durga Puja during a poll rally, promising one cylinder for each festival if the BJP returns to power. The announcement came amidst reports of long queues at gas distributors. The Congress criticized the move as a violation of the model code of conduct.

title: Happy Easter Sunday 2026: Top 50 wishes, messages and quotes to share
content: Easter Sunday mornings often bring a chaotic charm with a flood of digital greetings. This year, move beyond generic forwards with a curated list of 50 wishes, messages, and quotes.

title: Satpura tiger was poisoned, killed with electric wire by opium cultivator: Autopsy
content: In a heartbreaking turn of events, a rewilded tiger that had found its way back to the wilds of Satpura National Park faced a horrific fate at the hands of poachers. Investigators discovered that the majestic creature was first lured with poisoned bait laced with urea and then met its demise through electrocution.

title: Nagpur: 3 engineering students murder drunk driver after offering help
content: Three engineering students offered help to a drunk driver, but their gesture turned deadly. They allegedly killed the man to steal his car and phones, dumping his body to hinder identification. Police quickly apprehended the trio, who confessed to the crime.

title: IPL: Deshpande defends 11 in final over as Royals beat Titans by six runs
content: Rajasthan Royals edged Gujarat Titans by 6 runs in a last-ball thriller after posting 210/6. Tushar Deshpande held his nerve in the final over, sealing the win. Sai Sudharsan’s 73 kept Gujarat in the chase, but Ravi Bishnoi’s four wickets proved crucial. Royals moved to the top of the table with a strong net run rate.

title: West Bengal polls: Viral video of EC official preparing BJP material sparks row; TMC seeks action
content: A viral video allegedly showing an EC official preparing BJP campaign material has sparked a row in Kolkata. The TMC has demanded the official's removal and legal action, citing a breach of neutrality and the model code of conduct. They argue his actions pose a serious threat to free and fair elections.

title: Tamil Nadu polls: Is there any space for Vijay's TVK in the duopoly between DMK-AIADMK?
content: Actor Vijay Thalapathy's new party, TVK, is emerging as a third option in Tamil Nadu politics, challenging the long-standing dominance of DMK and AIADMK. With populist welfare promises and a strong social media presence, TVK aims to capture the significant unaligned vote, though electoral history suggests challenges remain.

title: Lok Sabha seats for southern states won't be reduced, says PM Modi
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi assured southern states that their Lok Sabha seats would be protected, even as the total number of seats might increase nationally. He also criticized Kerala's LDF and UDF for alleged "fake hostility" and targeting the Sabarimala temple, promising action if NDA forms the government.

title: Trump’s Xi moment? A military purge unfolds in the US
content: US President Trump's administration has overseen a significant churn in senior US military leadership, with multiple high-ranking officers exiting their posts. These removals, including Army Chief of Staff Gen Randy George, have raised concerns about institutional continuity and operational decision-making amid ongoing conflicts. The administration frames these changes as streamlining efforts, though critics question the impact on experienced leadership.

title: Bagram, Benghazi, and blame: Trump meets reality in Iran botch-up
content: The loss of U.S. aircraft and a missing pilot in Iran presents a critical political test for President Trump, whose image of invincibility is challenged by the escalating conflict. A high-stakes rescue operation is underway, with the outcome potentially validating or undermining his claims of strong leadership.

title: Gill injury update: Rashid sheds light on GT skipper comeback after RR loss
content: Rashid Khan said Shubman Gill is recovering well from a muscle spasm and could return soon after Gujarat Titans’ narrow loss to Rajasthan Royals. He admitted GT lost momentum with back-to-back wickets despite a strong start. Chasing 211, they fell short in the final over, with Rashid praising Tushar Deshpande’s “exceptional yorkers” for sealing the game.

title: Ganderbal encounter: National Conference, Congress seek ‘decent burial’ of man killed
content: MLAs in the J&K Assembly demanded the handover of Rashid Ahmad Mughal's body for a dignified burial, disputing the Army's account of the Ganderbal encounter. They asserted the family's constitutional right to perform last rites, even as a magisterial inquiry is underway. Legislators also called for a judicial probe and a government statement on the incident.

title: 'Ghatak' MP vs Kejriwal's 'soldiers': The Raghav Chadha showdown explained
content: Aam Aadmi Party MP Raghav Chadha has broken his silence after being removed as Rajya Sabha deputy leader. He denies allegations of 'soft PR' and deviating from the party line. Chadha states his silence should not be mistaken for defeat. He challenges his party to provide evidence for their claims. The controversy has drawn reactions from political opponents.

title: Middle East conflict may hit India’s exports beyond region if prolonged, says government
content: A prolonged Middle East conflict could significantly impact India's exports, both regionally and globally, due to supply chain disruptions, Commerce Secretary Rajesh Agrawal warned. He urged the pharmaceutical industry to reduce reliance on imported raw materials and build stronger domestic capacities to mitigate these risks and ensure continued growth in the sector.

title: Vitamin B12, D, Iron: Why deficiencies are rising and what you should do daily
content: A growing concern is emerging in India as deficiencies in Vitamin B12, D, and iron creep into lives across various age groups and lifestyles. Today's fast-paced living, characterized by unhealthy eating and minimal sunlight, plays a significant role in this trend. These nutrients are crucial—not just for maintaining energy and boosting immunity, but for our overall well-being.

title: ‘This has happened before’: How science explains Déjà Vu and the feeling of life on replay
content: An uncanny feeling of having lived a moment before, known as déjà vu, is explored by scientists. This sensation, often dismissed as a trick of the mind, is now understood as a healthy brain's 'fact-checking' mechanism detecting a mismatch between familiarity and reality. Researchers suggest it reveals much about memory and perception.

title: UConn tops Illini, makes 3rd title game in 4 years
content: UConn defeated Illinois in the Final Four on Saturday to advance to its third national championship game in the past four years.

title: Geno apologizes to South Carolina for outburst
content: UConn coach Geno Auriemma apologized to the South Carolina staff for his emotional outburst at Gamecocks coach Dawn Staley in the closing seconds of their Final Four matchup.

title: Sources: Lakers' Reaves (oblique) out 4-6 weeks
content: Lakers guard Austin Reaves has been diagnosed with a Grade 2 left oblique muscle injury and will be out for the remainder of the regular season.

title: Illinois rues misses after another Final Four loss
content: Illinois added another hard-luck loss in the Final Four, as an uncharacteristic performance from their offense sunk their hopes vs. UConn on Saturday.

title: Messi scores as Miami opens long-awaited stadium
content: Lionel Messi needed just 10 minutes to score Inter Miami's first goal in their long-awaited new stadium as his team played to an entertaining 2-2 draw with visiting Austin FC on Saturday.

title: UCLA in 'job's not done' mode after '25 letdown
content: With last year's Final Four loss under its belt, UCLA is approaching Sunday's national title game against South Carolina with a much more focused and "businesslike" mindset.

title: Wilder beats Chisora on points in bruising brawl
content: Deontay Wilder beat Derek Chisora in a scrappy but entertaining brawl Saturday to put himself back in the conversation for bigger fights at heavyweight.

title: Parker calls HOF enshrinement 'truly special'
content: Candace Parker, Elena Delle Donne, Chamique Holdsclaw and the 1996 U.S. Olympic women's team will enter the Naismith Memorial Basketball Hall of Fame later this year, joined by Amar'e Stoudemire, Mike D'Antoni, Joey Crawford, Doc Rivers and Mark Few.

title: 🤔 Geno better than postgame actions?
content: Geno Auriemma is a defining figure in women's basketball, which makes his behavior Friday night all the more disappointing.

title: Women's NCAA championship game predictions: South Carolina or UCLA -- and what will decide the title?
content: Dawn Staley's Gamecocks seek their third title in five seasons. UCLA is chasing its first NCAA championship.

title: Latest NBA buzz: What we know about Luka's hamstring injury
content: Here's what league insiders are talking about behind the scenes, including when Doncic might be able to return from his latest injury.

title: NHL playoff watch: Guide to all 15 games on Statement Saturday
content: More playoff spots (and eliminations) can be clinched around the league. Here's what to watch in each contest.

title: Welcome to Mullins Drive: How a small Indiana town is embracing its new March legend
content: The UConn freshman inked his name in Indiana basketball history. His hometown added it to street signs, too.

title: Who will be the best RBs in the NFL draft class? We gave projections and comps for top prospects
content: We have stat projections for the top running back prospects in the 2026 NFL draft class, from Jeremiyah Love to late-round sleepers.

title: Boxing results: Wilder edges Chisora on points, Riley wins cruiserweight title eliminator
content: ESPN has live updates of the heavyweight boxing clash between Derek Chisora and Deontay Wilder from London.

title: Deontay Wilder tells Anthony Joshua 'let's do it' -- the fight makes perfect sense
content: Deontay Wilder appeared to call out Anthony Joshua on Saturday, and it's a fight which makes perfect sense.

title: Three big trends from Portland, Toronto picks
content: The biggest (and, in some cases, surprising) picks for the Fire and Tempo had a few things in common.

title: Haaland hits long-awaited Man City hat trick as pressure piles on Liverpool's Slot
content: Erling Haaland's first Manchester City hat trick since August 2024 helped send his side to the FA Cup semifinals in a 4-0 thrashing over Liverpool.

title: Final NBA MVP (and ROY) straw poll: Here's who voters are picking to win
content: Can Wemby's late push unseat SGA? Tim Bontemps polls 100 NBA insiders for the latest MVP snapshot. Plus, a look at the race for top rookie.

title: End of the feature back? What the rise of running back tandems means for the NFL draft
content: Splitting time used to be a mark against rushers. With top NFL draft prospects coming from the same backfield, that might be changing.

title: With the Sabres' playoff berth, Jets stand alone with longest active playoff drought in North America
content: New York owns the longest playoff drought in major North American sports after Buffalo ended its streak at 14 seasons.

title: Who are the 39 best men's U21 players in the world?
content: For the eighth straight year, ESPN brings you our list of the game's next young stars aged 21 or under. Who is good enough to make it?

title: Transfer rumors, news: Man United, Man City pushing for Anderson
content: Manchester United and Manchester City are moving quickly to sign Nottingham Forest's Elliot Anderson. Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: Alvarez a top-10 bat? Ohtani wins Cy Young? Perdomo for real? Don't be surprised
content: Eric Karabell looks into the crystal ball to tell fantasy baseball managers what might come to pass in the not-too-distant future.

title: Halfway To The Moon, Astronauts On Artemis II Report Of Smelly Toilet
content: Debbie Korth, NASA's Orion program deputy manager, said the astronauts have also reported a smell coming from the bathroom.

title: US Says Arrested Relatives Of Iran General Qasem Soleimani, His Family Denies Link
content: Earlier in the month, Rubio also revoked the legal status of Fatemeh Ardeshir-Larijani, the daughter of  Ali Larijani.

title: "Unbalanced, Stupid": Iran On Trump's 48-Hour Ultimatum For Peace Deal
content: This defiant stance from Tehran comes after Trump said Iran has 48 hours to strike a deal or reopen the Strait of Hormuz "before all hell will rain down on them."

title: US-Iran War Live Updates: Iran Targets Israel, Kuwait After Trump's 48-Hour Deadline
content: US-Iran War Live Updates: The speech will offer Trump a wide audience to articulate clear objectives for the war that could attempt to reconcile weeks of changing goals

title: India Makes First Iranian Oil Purchase In 7 Years, With "No Payment Hurdle"
content: The world's third-biggest oil importer and consumer, India has not received a cargo from Tehran since May 2019.

title: 4 Cops Suspended For Chaos During Suvendu Adhikari's Nomination Filing
content: In a communique to the West Bengal chief secretary, the poll panel said the direction is based on a recommendation from state Chief Electoral Officer Manoj Kumar Agarwal.

title: Yamuna Clean-Up Goes High-Tech, Delhi Deploys Multitasking 'Harvesters'
content: Two machines, designed to remove floating garbage and dense aquatic weeds, were flagged off by Minister Parvesh Verma.

title: US' Most Lethal Long-Range Missiles Are Now Positioned For An Iran Strike
content: Along with the shorter-range JASSM - which has a range of about 250 miles, about two-thirds of US stockpiles have been committed to the Iran war.

title: Heat, Storms And Ballot: India's April Elections Face A New Climate Reality
content: The rising intensity of heat, humidity and violent pre-monsoon storms is emerging as a quiet but consequential force, one that could shape not only turnout but also the very mechanics of voting itself.

title: Deviations, Then Silence: What Happened Before Jharkhand Air Ambulance Crash
content: Aircraft Accident body, in its initial findings into the February 23 crash, has reconstructed the final moments of the Redbird Airways flight.

title: 5 Arrested For Blast Outside BJP Headquarters In Chandigarh, ISI Link Emerges
content: Preliminary investigations have revealed that the module was backed by Pakistan's ISI and operated under the directions of foreign-based handlers located in Portugal and Germany.

title: Bengal Officers Held Hostage In Malda Had Complained. Administration Says 'No Such Letter'
content: Nearly a week before the hostage incident, the officers, in a letter to Malda District Magistrate, the district's top official, had expressed "palpable apprehension of breach of security".

title: 2 Drones, 1 Minute Apart: How Iran Hit CIA Station Inside US Embassy In Saudi
content: The US Embassy in Riyadh, like most American diplomatic posts around the world, does not operate its own air defence systems.

title: How US Trains Pilots To Survive, Evade Capture After Being Shot Down
content: The blueprint for these missions comes from the Personnel Recovery Joint Publication, which lays out two overriding imperatives. First, safeguard the aircrew and then secure sensitive systems.

title: Assam May Gain 63 New Assembly Seats Under Women's Quota: Himanta Sarma
content: Chief Minister Himanta Biswa Sarma announced on Saturday that the state's total assembly seats could rise from 126 to 189, a net gain of 63 seats due to the implementation of women's reservation.

title: Explained: How Iran War Is Exposing Arab World's Economic Fault Lines
content: The Middle East war, in its sixth week, has left the entire region in a turmoil. And, effects are both short and long-term such as inflation, energy crisis, sharp fall in investors' confidence, etc.

title: Hope, Anxiety, Shifting Loyalties: Inside The Mind Of Assam's Muslim Voters
content: Over the past two decades, Muslims have played a decisive role in Assam's electoral politics. For years, this consolidation shaped electoral outcomes, with the Congress relying heavily on Muslim support as a key electoral base.

title: Gujarat HC bars AI use in decision-making, judgment drafting
content: AI cannot be used to author, generate, or substantially compose any judgment, final order, or binding legal ruling, even if subsequently reviewed by a judge, according to the policy document

title: Pinarayi slams Rahul for drawing equivalence between LDF and Hindutva forces in Chhattisgarh
content: Kerala Chief Minister says the Congress leader’s “brazenly misleading” statement smacks of an “impudence stemming from social and political illiteracy and ignorance”; he says the Congress’ “complacency and ideological ambiguity” in politically resisting Hindu majoritarian forces, including their trespasses on minorities, paved the way for the ascendancy of the Sangh Parivar-backed BJP in India

title: States are not Centre’s subordinates: Justice B.V. Nagarathna
content: Justice Nagarathna says the Centre ought to view the States as coordinates and federalism as a constitutional arrangement of co-equals

title: Odisha raises quota for STs, SCs; introduces reservation for OBCs in medical and technical education
content: Of the total 44,579 engineering seats in the State, the number for STs will increase from 5,349 to 10,030

title: Artemis II | Mission moon
content: The U.S. has cast the programme to return American astronauts to the moon as part of a race against China, but Beijing views its mission differently

title: U.P. CM Yogi Adityanath pushes for zero dropout, appeals to society for ensuring no child is left out of school
content: U.P. C.M. says student dropout rate in U.P. has reduced from 19% before 2017 to just three percent; children receive free uniforms, sweaters, bags, books, socks and shoes

title: Following the ideals of Jagjivan Ram, Congress to secure justice for downtrodden, says party leaders
content: During the function, U.P. Congress also felicitated current and former Members of Parliament (MPs) and Members of Legislative Assembly (MLAs) belonging to the Scheduled Castes, as well as individuals from the Scheduled Castes who have performed exemplary work in social service

title: Rajasthan to host nationwide roadshows ahead of agritech meet
content: The initiative aims at engaging with investors, agritech firms, research institutions, startups and key stakeholders to ensure participation and attract investments to the agriculture sector

title: Snow in hills, rain in plains as western disturbance sweeps north India
content: Rains and hailstorms have continued to lash the northern States intermittently this week, with wheat growers in Punjab, Haryana and Rajasthan staring at major losses due to crop damage

title: Kerala Assembly polls 2026: campaign trail heats up in Kundara as three major fronts intensify their reach-out programmes
content: Incumbent MLA P.C. Vishnunadh of UDF is banking on his track record, while LDF’s Sajikumar promises transformative projects. Robin Radhakrishnan of the NDA is advocating for radical change while pledging direct access to Prime Minister Modi if elected.

title: Chandigarh grenade blast case solved, claims Punjab DGP
content: Five accused have been arrested; police recovered one hand grenade and one (point).30 bore Zigana pistol from their possession

title: What are the concerns over the FCRA Bill?
content: How does the Home Ministry regulate foreign donations to NGOs in India? What are the key changes proposed to the Foreign Contribution (Regulation) Amendment Bill, 2026? Why has the Opposition objected to the Bill and why was the Bill deferred? What is its current status?

content: MP and Former Chief Minister Basavaraj Bommai has blamed the Congress party for the delay in implementation of the Upper Krishna Project

title: How did the ‘Amaravati Bill’ come into place?
content: Why has Amaravati been declared the sole capital of A.P.? Why did the A.P. Reorganisation Act need to be amended?

content: Among the key issues before the people is the long-pending demand of increased compensation for those who lost land to the Upper Krishna Project; another issue is the plan to expand the irrigated area for the implementation of Phase 3 of the project

title: ‘DMK far removed from its principles; law and order situation is concerning’
content: PMK leader Anbumani Ramadoss accuses Chief Minister M.K. Stalin of being influenced by a coterie of Ministers; he slams the DMK over a pending case in SC on making Tamil mandatory in educational institutions and the delay in caste census, asserts ‘like-minded parties’ have united to oust DMK

title: Find a fare balance for Namma Metro
content: BMRCL should lower prices till capacity utilisation is maximum, but it should not suffer losses; so government subsidy is welcome

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: LDF, UDF in a tight fight in Kuttiyadi; NDA hoping to make a change
content: Incumbent MLA K.P. Kunhammed Kutty of the LDF is taking on Parakkal Abdulla of the UDF again; the NDA has fielded Ramadas Manaleri

title: Defence Ministry pushes indigenous design for development of 1,000-kg aerial bomb for IAF
content: At present, Mk-84 class general-purpose bombs are procured from foreign original equipment manufacturers and are in service with the IAF

title: T.N. CM Stalin, Union Minister clash over three-language formula ahead of T.N. polls
content: Tamil Nadu Chief Minister M.K. Stalin says Centre has failed to make Tamil mandatory in KVs or appoint sufficient Tamil teachers, Education Minister says DMK is creating barriers that deny youth the chance to become multilingual global leaders

title: T.N. Assembly election: discrepancies surface in affidavits filed by Vijay for Tiruchi East and Perambur
content: These are with respect to personal details, criminal disclosures, and asset declarations. The Tiruchi East affidavit includes details of movable assets of his wife, son, and daughter, that don’t figure in the Perambur one

title: Will launch probe into Karunanidhi’s death after coming back to power, says Palaniswami
content: He was responding to DMK president and Chief Minister M.K. Stalin’s contention that the AIADMK leader has no right or locus standi to comment on the latter’s relationship with his father at an election campaign the previous day

title: Villagers erupt in protest after elephant kills elderly woman in Tripura
content: The agitation came to an end following the intervention of senior police and district administration officials

title: Seats in government universities should be increased to pursue higher education: VIT Chancellor
content: Stressing the importance of faculty, G. Viswanathan notes that teachers contribute 90 per cent to the success of educational institutions, with the remaining 10 per cent coming from administration and infrastructure

title: Experts highlight high-growth opportunities in semiconductor industry
content: At a webinar titled ‘Electronics and semiconductor careers: skills, roles, and how to get started’ , speakers focused on how the semiconductor industry would shape the future of all industries

title: FCRA Amendment Bill an attack on religious freedom, social activism: T.N. CM Stalin in Nagercoil
content: Mr. Stalin stressed that the FCRA Bill posed a danger that could cause irreversible and indelible damage to India’s global reputation

title: Supreme Court notifies nine-judge Bench for Sabarimala verdict review
content: The case consists of a series of writ pleas and review petitions based on a 2018 verdict allowing women of menstruating age entry into the Sabarimala Ayyappa temple in Kerala

title: Assam town rides BJP’s development showcase
content: The semiconductor plant, coming up on the space where a large paper mill once stood, has made Jagiroad hope again, but some are not sure how it would boost the local economy

title: Kerala Assembly polls 2026: Manalur constituency on the edge in a battle of titans
content: With no clear trend, the constituency braces for one of its fiercest electoral showdowns between UDF’s T. N. Prathapan, LDF’s C. Ravindranath, and BJP’s K.K. Aneesh Kumar

content: The perceived disillusionment of Gen Z and Gen Alpha, seeking justice for the late singer Zubeen Garg, is seen as a factor behind the change in the BJP’s poll narrative

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly elections: Full list of TVK candidates
content: Polling for all the 234 constituencies in Tamil Nadu is scheduled to be held in a single phase on April 23, 2026

title: Rajasthan High Court upholds cancellation of 2021 police Sub-Inspector exam over paper leak
content: The Division Bench says there should be ‘no political appointments’ within the Rajasthan Public Service Commission, directs the State government to enact a new law governing RPSC selection, and ensure complete transparency in recruitment processes

title: AAP, Raghav Chadha continue to spar over his removal as Rajya Sabha deputy leader
content: The MP rejects allegations raised against him by the party as ‘false’ and part of a ‘coordinated campaign’ against him

title: Centre’s claim of no displacement of tribals a lie: Congress on Great Nicobar project
content: Congress targets the BJP-led Government over the Great Nicobar draft relocation plan. Citing a report by The Hindu, the party says concerns of local communities being ignored

content: The VCK has instead fielded Jothimani, son of noted anti-caste leader L. Elayaperumal, from Kattumannarkoil

title: MVA rift: Uddhav likely to back Sunetra Pawar in Baramati bypoll, but Congress not on board
content: Ms. Pawar called Mr. Thackeray to seek his support in the seat her late husband left vacant, in line with State tradition; State Congress chief insists the party will field a candidate in Baramati

title: 'Special measures to ensure safe passage of ships from friendly nations like India': Iran envoy
content: At The Times of India, Ismat Ara covers politics, people, and societies, with a focus on accountability, justice, and lived experience. title: 'Bas 5 min keh kar gayi thi': Stabbed 15-year-old girl, left to bleed for 20 minutes, dies

title: Tracking fifth-year options for 2023 first-rounders: Who will return in 2027?
content: the deadline for teams to pick up fifth-year options on the rookie contracts of 2023 first-round draft picks is May 1 . if the team declines the option, the player remains under contract for 2027 . we are tracking the entire 2023 class, which had only 31 picks after the Miami Dolphins were stripped of their first round selection .

title: NBA playoff watch: Can Spurs stay red hot?
content: the Los Angeles Lakers are still the 3-seed in the West, but that position could be rapidly slipping away . the Denver Nuggets will be without stars Luka Doncic and Austin Reaves for the remainder of the regular season . one of those games comes on Thursday against the Golden State Warriors .
